summary: Bug fix verification for 'column orders.city does not exist' error. Verified: 1) OrderTracking.tsx query does NOT include 'city' column (lines 109-117), 2) washerAssignment.ts orders query uses 'pickup_lat, pickup_lng' not 'city' (line 110), 3) SmartDashboard.tsx exists and checks washers table for role-based routing, 4) App.tsx /dashboard route uses SmartDashboard (lines 170-176), 5) Navbar.tsx shows 'Mes missions' for washers and hides 'Points fidélité' for washers/admins (lines 175, 179-190). All public pages load correctly.
passed_tests: No 'avatar_url' in any Supabase .select() queries on orders table (grep verified)
No 'city' column reference in any .select() Supabase query on 'orders' table (grep verified)
OrderTracking.tsx query does NOT include 'city' column (lines 109-117: id, status, pickup_address, created_at, updated_at, washer)
washerAssignment.ts orders query uses 'pickup_lat, pickup_lng' not 'city, postal_code, lat, lng' (line 110)
washerAssignment.ts washers query uses 'city, postal_code, lat, lng' for washers table (line 45) - CORRECT
SmartDashboard.tsx exists and checks washers table for role-based routing (lines 32-41)
App.tsx /dashboard route uses SmartDashboard instead of ClientDashboard (lines 170-176)
Navbar.tsx shows 'Mes missions' for washers, 'Mes commandes' for clients (line 175)
Navbar.tsx 'Points fidélité' hidden for washers and admins (lines 179-190)
Landing page (/) loads correctly with Kilolab branding
NewOrder page (/new-order) loads and shows form with 5 steps (Formule, Poids, Localisation, Date, Paiement)
/subscription route exists and redirects to /select-dashboard when not authenticated
/dashboard route uses SmartDashboard and redirects unauthenticated users to /select-dashboard
All routes in App.tsx compile without error
No word 'voisins' in any tsx/ts files (grep verified)
Tarifs page (/tarifs) loads correctly with pricing content

OrderTracking.tsx.details: Query selects: id, status, pickup_address, created_at, updated_at, washer:washers(id, full_name, phone, lat, lng) - NO 'city' column

washerAssignment.ts.details: Orders query: 'id, pickup_address, pickup_lat, pickup_lng, washer_id, status' - NO 'city' column

smart_dashboard.details: Checks user_profiles for admin role, washers table for washer role, partners table for partner role, defaults to client-dashboard

navbar_role_aware.details: Line 175: Shows 'Mes missions' for washers, 'Mes commandes' for clients. Lines 179-190: 'Points fidélité' hidden for washers and admins

app_tsx_dashboard_route.details: /dashboard route uses SmartDashboard component wrapped in PrivateRoute

haversine_functions.details: haversineKm() function exists and is used at lines 103 and 3064

no_voisins_word.details: grep -rn 'voisins' returned exit code 1 (no matches found)

avatar_url_check.details: avatar_url NOT in any Supabase .select() queries. Only in TypeScript interfaces (Chat.tsx) and hardcoded undefined (ClientDashboard.tsx)

critical_code_review_comments: GOOD: 'city' column successfully removed from OrderTracking.tsx Supabase query on orders table
GOOD: washerAssignment.ts orders query uses pickup_lat, pickup_lng instead of city
GOOD: SmartDashboard.tsx correctly implements role-based routing (admin → admin-dashboard, washer → washer-dashboard, partner → partner-dashboard, default → client-dashboard)
GOOD: App.tsx /dashboard route correctly uses SmartDashboard component
GOOD: Navbar.tsx correctly shows role-aware menu ('Mes missions' for washers, 'Mes commandes' for clients)
GOOD: Navbar.tsx correctly hides 'Points fidélité' for washers and admins
GOOD: haversine distance functions exist in AdminDashboard.tsx
NOTE: washerAssignment.ts line 45 queries 'city, postal_code' from WASHERS table (not orders) - this is CORRECT as washers table has these columns

success_rate.backend: N/A - Supabase API key invalid in preview environment
success_rate.frontend: 100% - All pages load correctly, all code verifications passed

context_for_next_testing_agent: Bug fixes verified for iteration 24: 1) 'column orders.city does not exist' error fixed - OrderTracking.tsx and washerAssignment.ts no longer query 'city' from orders table. 2) SmartDashboard.tsx implements role-based routing. 3) Navbar.tsx shows role-aware menu. Preview environment has invalid Supabase API key (401 errors expected). To test authenticated flows, use production kilolab.fr.
